name: VanEck Rare Earth/Strategic Metals ETF
description: The VanEck Rare Earth/Strategic Metals ETF (REMX) seeks to replicate as closely as possible, before fees and expenses, the price and yield performance of the MVIS Global Rare Earth/Strategic Metals Index. The fund invests in companies involved in producing, refining, and recycling of rare earth and strategic metals and minerals. These materials are critical to many modern technologies, including electric vehicle batteries, wind turbines, and defense systems. By providing exposure to the global supply chain of these essential materials, the ETF offers investors a way to participate in the growth of industries reliant on specialized metal resources.
